Off Calendar Jun-12-2007 Off Calendar

Hearing On Judgment For Validation.
Off Calendar Mar-29-2007 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for Validation/Default Prove-Up Hearing this day.
Dept. 218, Comm. Sue Kaplan, Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha, CSR: Brenda Fields.
Thomas Lakritz, Deputy City Attorney, for Plaintiff: City and County of San Francisco, a Municipal Corporation.
After hearing the evidence presented, and considered the papers submitted, the Court rules in favor of the Plaintiff and against the Defaulted Defendants: All Persons Interested in the Matter of the validity of the execution and delivery by the CIty and County of San Francisco, etc.
Judgment signed in open court, see scanned doc. for details of the Judgment.
